$comment: Tend screenshot traversal + Tier-2 outcome assertions. Generates qa/flows/mobile.yaml (scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs); never hand-edit the yaml. Anchors live in qa/selectors.json and target the seeded people (src/qa/fixtures.ts). The reach-out assertion pins the core action: logging contact flips the seeded person's status to 'Reached out today' (assertNot -> assert). Extended 2026-07-11: the cadence drill-down spoke is pinned with an outcome assertion (row Weekly → sheet → Monthly).

survival.$comment: T4 chaos net — state-survival subflow (compiles to qa/flows/state-survival.yaml; full profile + nightly, NOT per-PR). Core mutating action = log contact ('I reached out'), which persists to disk. Then REAL process death (killApp on Android / stopApp on iOS), then relaunch keeping state. Because a contacted person leaves Today's 'Reach out' list, the post-kill re-navigation goes through the People tab. Intent oracle: the seeded person still reads 'Reached out today' after the kill — the log survived the crash.
